home.storyText1: TAJDO is a name born from a bond: a combination of <1>Tajana</1> and her dog, <3>Dollar</3>. An unbeatable team from Switzerland to Zanzibar, their story is the heart of our brand.
home.storyText2: A trip to Zanzibar changed everything for our founder. Moved by the plight of street dogs, she dedicated her life to their cause, creating a brand that gives back with every purchase.
home.storyText3: TAJDO was born from this love—a desire to take responsibility and make a meaningful difference.

about.heroSubheading: Every purchase supports TAJDO NGO in the rescue and rehabilitation of street dogs in Zanzibar.
about.storyText1: TAJDO is a name born from a bond—a combination of <1>Tajana</1> and her dog, <3>Dollar</3>. An inseparable team from Switzerland to Zanzibar, their story is the heart of our brand.
about.storyText2: Growing up in Switzerland, Tajana's deep love for animals led her to an animal shelter in Italy, where she met Dollar. From that moment, they became inseparable companions. A trip to Zanzibar changed the course of their lives. Feeling an immediate connection to the island and deeply moved by the plight of street dogs, Tajana decided to dedicate her life to helping them.
about.storyText3: <0>TAJDO NGO</0> was born from this love—a commitment to protecting and caring for the street dogs of Zanzibar. It represents the belief that the love we share with our own dogs should extend to those still waiting for safety, care, and a home. Through feeding programs, rescues, sterilization efforts, and adoption support, TAJDO NGO continues to give these dogs a second chance.
about.storyText4: After two years of leading the organization, the team decided to expand their impact. Today, <0>10% of every purchase</0> at TAJDO goes toward providing food, care, shelter, medication, sterilization, protection, and adoption support for street dogs across Zanzibar.
about.storyText5: <0>Every purchase is a small act of love. Thank you for being part of our story.</0>
about.missionDescription: TAJDO is more than just an organization—we are a community of people dedicated with heart and soul to helping the street dogs of Zanzibar. Our goal is to enable every dog to live a safe, loving, and healthy life.
about.mission1Desc: Our primary mission is to sustainably improve the welfare of street dogs. We ensure every animal has access to food, water, medical care, and a safe environment.
about.mission2Desc: We place dogs in loving homes and work with local vets for vaccinations, surgeries, and spaying/neutering to sustainably regulate the population.
about.mission3Desc: We work to change cultural misconceptions about dogs, raising awareness of their needs and rights to foster harmonious coexistence within the community.
about.value1Desc: Every purchase directly funds our rescue station in Zanzibar, providing food, medical care, shelter, and sterilization programs for dogs in need.
about.value2Desc: We believe luxury and responsibility go hand in hand. We choose sustainable, high-quality materials and timeless designs that are made to last.
about.value3Desc: Designed for your furry companion, handcrafted in Tanzania, and shipped worldwide. We blend precision with the warmth and soul of East African craftsmanship.
about.ctaDescription: Browse our collection of luxury pet accessories and know that every purchase makes a difference.

returns.heading: Returns & Exchanges
returns.description: We want you and your companion to be completely satisfied.
returns.faq1q: How do I start a return?
returns.faq1a: Email us at returns@tajdo.ch with your order number and reason for return. We'll send you a prepaid return label within 24 hours.
returns.faq2q: What items are eligible for return?
returns.faq2a: All unused items in their original packaging can be returned within 30 days of delivery. Personalized or custom items are final sale.
returns.faq3q: How long does a refund take?
returns.faq3a: Refunds are processed within 5-7 business days of receiving the returned item. The amount will be credited to your original payment method.
returns.faq4a: Yes! Contact us and we'll arrange an exchange. If the new item has a different price, we will adjust accordingly.
returns.faq5q: What if my item arrived damaged?
returns.faq5a: We apologize! Email us within 48 hours of delivery with photos of the damage. We will send a replacement immediately, free of charge.
returns.faq6q: Do handcrafted items have a warranty?
returns.faq6a: All handcrafted items from our Tanzanian artisans have a 6-month craftsmanship warranty covering material defects and stitching.
returns.formDescription: Enter your details below to request a return label.
returns.toastSuccessDesc: We'll email you a return label shortly.
returns.toastErrorDesc: Could not submit request. Please try again.
